name: GPT-2 영문 동화 생성
story_en:
A children's story.

Once upon a time, there was a children ' s drawing of a little girl carrying a basket of eggs. The main character was girl, drawing outside. The mood was happy.

The story begins:


-Girl sitting on the balcony and looking out at all her friends waiting for their arrival when they arrive to meet them in front courtyard (the garden) - Girl has an egg hanging from one shoulder as she stares up through window towards sky where others are gathered watching birds or flowers growing around with red eyes that look like stars but instead of being brighter it is just dark brownish green colour/lighter than water blue color / Bird flying across space; bird appears very high above other trees making him seem small without wings so he must be huge if his body were tall enough
